---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for BoilerFuel
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see -->

## Problem Statement
<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed? -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe how you envision this feature working -->

## Alternative Solutions
<!-- Optional: Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered -->

## Use Case
<!-- Who would benefit from this feature? How would they use it? -->

## Implementation Details
<!-- Optional: Technical details or suggestions for implementation -->

## Mockups/Examples
<!-- Optional: Add any mockups, wireframes, or examples from other apps -->

## Priority
<!-- How important is this feature to you? -->
- [ ] Critical — Blocking my workflow
- [ ] High — Would significantly improve experience
- [ ] Medium — Nice to have
- [ ] Low — Minor improvement

## Additional Context
<!-- Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here -->
